competitorDrones.label: Other drone brands carried
competitorDrones.note: Acknowledged but not featured on dealer sites. Don't list specific non-GTEEX model names.

brandVibe.label: Brand vibe
brandVibe.note: Used to guide archetype selection. See archetypes/_index.json `vibes` arrays for the mapping.

formFields.label: Contact form configuration
formFields.note: Every form includes Name/Email/Phone/Message as base fields. During onboarding, ask whether the dealer qualifies leads (add Acres/Crop/Platform) or categorizes intent (add Interest dropdown). Pyro Ag uses Interest; Great River uses Acres/Crop/Platform; most other dealers use base only.

normalizations._description: Directional map from common variant service names to canonical values in fields.services.allowedValues. Use ONLY for unambiguous, wording-level variants (not semantic or fuzzy matches). Any HTML service name that does not exactly match a canonical value AND does not appear as a key in this table must be flagged for human review, not auto-mapped.
